title: Creamy Liquid Cheese Soup
description: A fresh, creamy Dutch dish featuring liquid cheese in a savory broth, perfect for adventurous palates and Jain-friendly.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add vegetable stock and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low.
Slowly stir in the grated Gouda cheese, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon until well combined and mixture starts to thicken.
Stir in white pepper flakes and salt according to taste.
Gently fold in spinach leaves, letting them wilt slightly. Cover and simmer for about 5 minutes or until desired consistency is achieved.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
